name: waltz
description: Waltz - 家計簿Webアプリケーション

scripts.api:copy-types: cp shared/types.ts api/src/types.ts || copy shared\types.ts api\src\types.ts
scripts.api:push: npm run api:copy-types && cd api && npx clasp push --force
scripts.app:dev: npm run app:copy-types && cd app && npm run dev
scripts.app:build: npm run app:copy-types && cd app && npm run build
